content: caught myself feeling relieved that my coffee was only 4.10 this morning and then had to sit with what 'only' means in london now
i still rehearse one sentence before the post office every time and then the woman behind the glass asks me something completely different
this city feels cinematic and full of possibility in a way that is hard to explain
someone stopped dead in the bike lane in gracia to film a doorway and three locals swerved around him without even looking annoyed, which felt like its own civic skill
the guy at the spati handed me the coldest bottle from the back fridge without me asking and i swear it fixed my mood more than the beer itself
"i am not angry i am just freezing" on the victoria line and somehow that sounded more honest than half the couples i know
by 9:12 i had three calendar invites, one 'quick question' in slack, and a notification reminding me to breathe. deeply unserious city
same tiny coffee at the bar, same old man already arguing about football, same five minutes where i almost believe i live here properly
